caption: A man with short brown hair and a grey t-shirt is seated in a recording studio or podcast setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and sits behind a large, dark grey computer monitor that partially obscures the left side of the frame. In front of him is a professional microphone attached to a black boom arm. To his right is a black acoustic foam sound-absorbing panel with vertical ridges. He is captured in a side profile, looking toward the monitor and microphone. Throughout the sequence, he appears to be speaking, with his mouth slightly open and his facial expressions shifting slightly as he talks. His posture remains consistent, leaning slightly forward. No text or logos are visible in the scene. The background remains static, with only the man's subtle facial movements indicating the passage of time.
